abhy-√1. aś -aśnoti, (frequently Opt. or Prec. 1. sg. -aśyām, 3. sg. -aśyās [ RV. iv, 5, 7 ], 1. pl. -aśyāma; aor. P. -ānaṭ and Ā. -āṣṭa; perf. 1. pl. -ānaśma, 3. pl. -ānaśuḥ)
to pervade, reach to, gain,  RV. ;
(Subj. 1. du. -aśnavāva, 1. pl. -aśnavāma) to overpower,  RV.
